payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Nearly at the ready. All right, so as you all take a moment and kind of steel yourselves, your ears perk up and you can hear what sounds like echoes of distant footsteps down hallways, far out of sight. You hear some movement across the stone ceiling above you that eventually comes to a stop. And you wait for about a minute, and the entire place is now in a very eerie silence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're following her, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've followed her back into the base floor of the Emberhold itself. You all currently are now back kinda where you started after you snuck into the side passage of the Emberhold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And she said she would lead the way to the vault?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can we be quiet for a second and see if there's any footsteps around us or guards marching around? Are we in immediate peril or do we have a second?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Certainly. Everyone go ahead and make an immediate perception roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So fast!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Website went live, if you want to announce that now or later.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Later. Two?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, 22! (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Fail.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a fail! All right, so-- You've got to be ready!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure he'll give you half of that.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You haven't had a short rest yet, and you do--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And his back is to me, currently?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's kinda to the side to you. He's currently looking-- working out the anvil, banging down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So this way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, but I see the door on the other side, so I take the earring--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, why don't you just keep going forever?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: -- take the earring and I whisper to my sister, (whispers) follow along.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. I've been invited on the field trip, guys!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just me!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Who else can stealth?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm a stealthy panther right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you wanna be something and pop in my pocket? (laughs) That sounded wrong.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. Go ahead and roll initiative real fast to see who gets off first what.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I just stop! And I creep back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you creep back, you hear footsteps coming your way quickly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to the door, then, I can hear that. Inside the door, inside the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, inside the door there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stay actually right there, just right at the threshold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The rest of you guys?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I'm so far away. I can try to get up there but--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can glance, there's still a hallway around that way if you wanted to go around.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll go around the back way then.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you move around--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: With Trinket!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket follows up behind. Makes your way up there. Scanlan, you staying in that room?

preceding_turns.text: I'm taking a dump on the guest bed. (laughter)

preceding_turns.text: They don't see me, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like walk by the door and see that happening (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM

preceding_turns.text: Okay, well, you're in mid-process, this is all happening very quickly.

preceding_turns.text: Oh. (grunts)

preceding_turns.text: I'll go around back behind where Trinket and Vex just went.

preceding_turns.text: Okay. Because of your little legs you get about that far. Your little legs carry you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) (grunting and laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's apparating poo.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm staying in the hallway,

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan's just like, I hate this mission.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so. Tiberius, as you're backing up, both the duergar turn around immediately, seeing you, and rear back with javelins, throwing them directly at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Oh! I'll cast Blur instead.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Now, guys, everyone roll initiative. That was a surprise round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You both just sit there, grasping your heads, just screaming in pain as your body is unable to function or listen to any thought process. Clarota also unfortunately falls victim to this and is also unable to make any actions.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm pulling out my flametongue dagger to try to get a little bit of light in here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, however-- You, as you are currently pulling out your flametongue dagger, you feel a presence nearby, and with a little bit of embers around the fire, you see, out of nothing, a figure step into view that apparently was not visible but a moment before. A tall, lithe figure, with long limbs, fingers and a wrapping of facial tentacles coming towards your face.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It was invisible.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I see him, I'm gonna stab, I'm just gonna stab.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Before you get the chance to stab, you get a surprise attack from this guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no, what if he sucks our brains out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, that comes to an 18 versus armor class.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he got me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, as you go back for your blade to pull it out, he grabs you by the shoulders and pulls you, and the tentacles wrap around your face and pull you into this horrible toothy maw. You feel this tearing pain sensation as its teeth begin to dig into your face.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No, no, no, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, he's gonna die.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That hurts. A lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take 17 points of psychic damage as the actual presence of the tentacles pulling on your face, you feel it's kind of grabbing your brain and trying to hold it in place. You are currently considered grappled.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Son of a bitch.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You haven't taken a short rest yet. You have to-- you guys have to stop and take ten minutes, 15 minutes to rest to do that, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM

preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.text: The right, you see what looks to be a doorway that's partially open that leads to a staircase.

preceding_turns.text: Looks like it's going up.

preceding_turns.text: And what's in this room? I'm looking over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you look over here. It's a double door that is currently closed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will head in your direction as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Eight, two of my d6s to heal up.

payload.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So vicious.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That is threatening.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Damn.

preceding_turns.text: And bonus damage to his mother, wherever she may be.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

(laughter)

preceding_turns.text: Oh, cool!

preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Absolutely, Scanlan, I'll take that for now. And I put it in my pouch.

preceding_turns.text: Quickly. Quickly.

preceding_turns.text: So while you're looking that up-- The duergar brace themselves and they have an innate natural resistance against things magical in nature.

preceding_turns.text: Evasion!

preceding_turns.text: So they all take the brunt of the damage, however, it does not do as much as you hoped to the group. All of them look hurt, but definitely not taken out of the fight. The two lizard creatures you now have a better look at, you do see it's familiar. They have numerous sets of legs, and though the chains hold them at bay, both of them glance up instinctually. I want you, Tiberius, to make two constitution saving throws.

preceding_turns.text: Traps.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM

preceding_turns.text: Yeah you take half-damage. So you take the-- What was the total damage on your Fireball? So you take 15 points of fire damage. Suddenly you feel your form begin to tighten up, instant. You are considered restrained, which means you are at disadvantage to all your attack rolls and ability checks for right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Hold on, I still have a bonus attack I can do before that happens, correct?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I got it.

preceding_turns.text: No, that's just to hit something with a spell.

preceding_turns.text: Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yep. All right, so both arrows (impact sounds). One clips her in the leg, and the other embeds itself in her abdomen. You see she grabs for it. She's looking really rough. Next is Kima. Kima's stone. It's now the queen's turn. She looks over at you who's stabbed her, the arrows in her abdomen, and she looks up at Grog and says, (sighs) "We've got business elsewhere." And she reaches out and touches Grog. Both of them blink out, Dimension Door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You-- it's completely blocked right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I run across behind it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Through here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Is that magmous right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it is. It's still pouring! She slowed it down, but it's still breaking through and pouring out slower. It would be even bigger if they hadn't slowed it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then well, maybe I won't run in that direction. I run in the other direction and down-- yeah. So I can see.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Roll for an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: First attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: First attack is (sings) 20. No. 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! Okay. 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Second attack is-- Second attack is (sings) 21!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hits. Roll damage on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What's that? 12?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Or 12 damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 12 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, 12 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, um. Hunter's Mark. Damn it. Bonus action!

payload.trigger_phrase: you make your way to the door
payload.raw_text: Okay, gotcha. So, Pike and Scanlan, both of you guys are, unfortunately 'cause you're smaller and your legs are moving, you guys rush down the stairway and curl around. As the rest of you make your way to the door, which is currently closed, you are all kinda gathered at the exterior of that hidden doorway. It's currently dark and held shut on where you guys entered. However, you two, the magma's now reached the stairway. It's beginning to pour down off the top, and it manages to catch the two of you. You guys each take five points of heat damage from the magma's proximity.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Do I get my Enhance Ability?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns_last5.text: I would like to note that I am frozen like this.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It was permanent, but a perpetual flow of magma on it for a period of a few hours will eventually eat through a stone wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ah, it's hot, it's hot, it's hot!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hot hot hot hot hot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'm picking up Tiberius' stone butt and continuing--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you guys push through the open hole that Keyleth pushed in, sweat dripping down your faces as the heat proximity to you is nigh-intolerable. You make your way out of the gate and now you have that giant magma flow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right! Is the thing not-- wasn't there--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No no-- as you guys go and step out, the doorway that opened up, previously? Is what parted the magma flow. You pulled it open, so now it's just a wall of magma in front of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She also had created a wall barrier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I did create a wall over top.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You did. It's not there anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It was permanent!

payload.raw_text: Okay. It's probably the last of that. You create a stone wall that juts out, once again blocking off the magma flow. You guys all step out of the room just as the main force of magma begins to fill the room behind you. Everyone make one more dexterity check to get out in time, as it's a small space and you're pushing out.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You did. It's not there anymore.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: It was permanent, but a perpetual flow of magma on it for a period of a few hours will eventually eat through a stone wall.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: I can. Yeah. Do it again. Bam.
